headline: Abbott Q2 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Stock Up in Pre-market
summary: ABT tops Q2 earnings and revenue estimates and lifts 2026 EPS guidance, while Medical Devices and Cancer Diagnostics fuel growth despite Nutrition weakness.

headline: Is Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. (CATX) Stock Outpacing Its Medical Peers This Year?
summary: Here is how Perspective Therapeutics (CATX) and Charles River Laboratories (CRL) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

headline: Does Arovella CAR-iNKT NGS Partnership Deepen Charles River’s Cell Therapy Moat or Stretch CRL Too Thin?
summary: In July 2026, Arovella Therapeutics announced a collaboration with Charles River Laboratories International to provide GMP Next Generation Sequencing services for iNKT cell characterization and viral safety testing in support of ALA-101, an off-the-shelf CAR-iNKT therapy targeting CD19+ B cell cancers. The partnership, combined with Charles River’s recent acquisition of NGS specialist Pathoquest, underscores its push into higher-value sequencing-based testing for cell and gene...
